2. Smith School Lower Level Core (C- or higher, regular grading option)

____ MATH120(220) or MATH140 (or MATH130) Calculus I (3/4)

____ BMGT110 Business Value Chain (3) (not required for transfer students)

Note: A maximum combined total of 6 credits of BMGT468 and BMGT469 coursework can be applied toward the Management major requirements.

____ BMGT220 Principles of Accounting I (3)

____ BMGT221 Principles of Accounting II (3)

____ BMGT230 or 231 (or equivalent) Business Statistics (3)
